response.justification: The candidate lacks any demonstrable C++ experience beyond early career roles, has no evidence of cloud compute platform leadership, and shows no experience with large-scale distributed systems or infrastructure in the required context — all core requirements for the role.
strengths: Extensive full-stack experience across multiple languages and domains
Strong track record of open-source contributions and technical mentoring
Proven ability to lead ambiguous projects and build developer tooling
concerns: No evidence of 8+ years of C++ programming as required
Lacks documented experience with cloud compute platforms or distributed systems at scale
No prior technical leadership role mentoring cloud or DevOps engineers
